title: Best Adjustable Dumbbells of 2026: Space-Saving Home Gym Picks
excerpt: Replace an entire rack of weights with one pair. Here are the best adjustable dumbbells that are worth the investment.
author: CompareElite Team

products.name: Bowflex SelectTech 552 (5-52.5 lbs)
cons: Takes a few seconds to adjust

products.name: PowerBlock Elite EXP (5-50 lbs)
cons: Unusual shape takes getting used to

faq.q: Are adjustable dumbbells worth it vs buying fixed weights?
faq.a: For home gyms, absolutely. A set of adjustable dumbbells from 5-52.5 lbs replaces 15+ pairs of weights and takes up a fraction of the space.

faq.q: What weight range should I buy?
faq.a: Beginners: a set going up to 25-30 lbs is sufficient. Intermediate lifters should aim for up to 50-55 lbs. Advanced lifters should consider sets reaching 70-90 lbs.
